ModMetaData.name: 全自动万能制造机 FullyAutomaticOmniCrafter
ModMetaData.author: Jeremie
ModMetaData.description:
[h2] 全自动万能制造机 FullyAutomaticOmniCrafter [/h2]
无中生有！将能量转化为物质！ 全自动万能制造机 FullyAutomaticOmniCrafter 闪亮登场！ 超凡世界的科技结晶，能将能量转化为物质，满足你对资源的无限需求！ 无论是食物、药品还是建筑和材料，这台神奇的机器都能轻松制造出来！让你的殖民地焕发新生，迎接崭新的明天！ 超凡科技！小子！
添加立即完成当前可完成的科技按钮，点击后会立即完成当前科技树上所有满足条件的科技研究，直到没有可完成的科技为止。让你的科技树瞬间满级，直接进入后期游戏！
自带一个无限容量电池，可以存储无限多的电能。解决在制造超贵物品时需要制造大量电池的问题。
在制造物品时，首先消耗内置电池的电量，再消耗电网电池的电量。 但是！如果电网的供电能力超过了制造物品所需的能量，那么，不需要消耗任何存储的电能就能直接制造物品。没想到吧~！
一般情况下像正常电池一样工作，可以存储电网的电量，也可以在电网电量不足时释放电能。 如果不需要内置电池功能，只需要点击按钮关闭建筑的电源(按V)即可。
雨淋不会短路，电路短路不会爆炸（暂未测试）
另外，收藏夹会在存档间同步。
现在需要依赖Harmony的拦截功能来实现电力相关的内容。
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 物质-能量转化仪 MatterEnergyConverter [/h2]
将物质分解成夸克粒子，转化为弦场，随后将其抽取为能量！资源回收好帮手！ 物质能量转化仪 MatterEnergyConverter 堂堂登场！
超凡世界的又一科技结晶，能将物质分解成夸克粒子，转化为弦场，随后将其抽取为能量！ 无论是食物、药品还是建筑和材料，这台神奇的机器都能轻松分解！殖民地再也不会缺乏能源！ 超凡科技说，要有光！
[h3] 有三种回收方法 [/h3] [list] [*] 设置存储区设置，像存储建筑一样小人会自动搬运进去，再点转化存储物按钮，建筑上的所有物品就会被分解转化了。 [*] 用空投仓的装载按钮像装载空投仓那样装载物品，再点转化装载物按钮，货舱里的物品就会被分解转化了。 [*] 直接点定点转化按钮，随后用十字光标点需要转化的物品或建筑，就会立即被分解转化了。 [/list]
提示：物质能量转化仪的存储区不会老化、腐烂度会不断重置，因此可以作为特殊仓库暂存物品。
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 亚空间资产黑洞发生器 SubspaceAssetBlackHoleGenerator [/h2]
将殖民地的资产折叠进亚空间，使其对威胁评估算法不可见！减少袭击规模的秘密武器！ 亚空间资产黑洞发生器 SubspaceAssetBlackHoleGenerator 悄然登场！
超凡世界地下黑市流传的神秘装置，能将殖民地的资产折叠进亚空间，隐藏殖民地的存在性，使敌人低估殖民地的财富，从而减少袭击规模！让你的殖民地成为敌人眼中的隐形基地！
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 终极自动修复站 UltimateAutoRepair [/h2]
将危险扼杀在摇篮里！持续修复殖民地中的损坏建筑和物品！ 终极自动修复站 UltimateAutoRepair 就在这里！
超凡世界居家旅行必备装置，自动检查家庭空间中的损坏，并持续修复它们！只要有一台终极自动修复站在运作，整个殖民地的建筑和物品都会得到持续的修复！让你的殖民地时刻保持在最佳状态，迎接任何挑战！
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 虚空删除器 VoidDeleter [/h2]
刚才碾过去的是什么东西？我还以为是减速带呢。 立即挖掘和拆除任何看起来不顺眼的东西！ 哪里不会点哪里！So Easy！
超凡世界的垃圾处理专家，立即挖掘和拆除任何看起来不顺眼的东西！让你的殖民地焕然一新！
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 现实编织器 RealityWeaver [/h2]
依照蓝图实现你的梦想！立即具现指定区域内的建筑蓝图和施工框！建造好帮手！ 现实编织器 RealityWeaver 来了！
超凡世界居家旅行前哨站建设必备装置，能将指定区域内的建筑蓝图和施工框立即具现为建筑！ 消耗的电量与每座建筑所需工作量成正比（每单位工作量消耗 1 Wd）。 优先使用物质-能量转化仪能量，其次是全自动万能合成仪无限电池，最后是普通电池。断电或禁用时零性能开销。
添加立即按照屋顶区域规划完成屋顶的安装和拆除的按钮，点击后会按照当前的建造屋顶区/移除屋顶区划设置，在全图范围内建造或拆除屋顶。 支持 扩展屋顶 (ExpandedRoofing) 的 无厚屋顶规划 。 扩展屋顶 (ExpandedRoofing) 的建设规划会被正常的自动建造模式完成（因为它实际上实现为了一种特殊的建筑蓝图框架）。
添加立即打磨地板和岩壁按钮，点击后会自动完成当前地图上所有已规划的打磨地面和打磨墙壁的任务。 添加立即完成地板粉饰和移除地板粉饰按钮，点击后会自动完成全图所有已规划的粉饰地板和移除地板涂料任务（免耗材）。
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 全域火焰抑制器 GlobalFireExtinguisher [/h2]
利用空间折叠技术，将地图上的所有火焰全部丢进亚空间！全图灭火好帮手！
超凡世界消防必备，防微杜渐，防火要从小火抓起！放烟花的时候记得先关掉它哦！
[hr][/hr]
[h2] 幻影隔离墙 OmniPhantomWall [/h2]
源自超凡世界的隔离墙，通常用来作为高门大院最外围的防护墙，可以绝对阻止敌人进入，而主人则可以随时穿过它进出。 这样的特殊性使得其在殖民地具有了更加广泛的用途。 作为殖民地最外围的围墙，防止敌人进入；作为殖民地内部的隔断，分离不同功能区但又允许自由通行。
幻影隔离墙 特性： [list] [*] 选择性通行：主人可以随时穿过它进出，而敌人则无法穿过它。主人可以透过它射击敌人，而敌人则无法透过它射击主人。 [*] 绝对坚固：无法受到任何伤害，无论是爆炸、火焰还是攻击，都不会对它造成任何损伤。敌人不会尝试去攻击它。 [/list]
可以使用幻影隔离墙制造一个没有门的房间，来完全避免敌人进入，但又允许主人自由进出。
在外太空可以使用幻影隔离墙填满一整个区域，来形成一个可以自由通行但不缺氧的空间，来保护其中的小人免受外太空环境的伤害。
[hr][/hr]
[h3]建议配合使用的mod[/h3]
[list] [*] MinifyEverything 让所有建筑都支持打包（支持打包的建筑才能被成功生产出来） https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=872762753 [/list]
[hr][/hr]
可在Mod设置中调整能量转化公式。 Y = a + b·X + c·X² + d·X³ + e·X⁴ + g·log₁₀(X) + n·ln(X) X = 物品的市场价值 + [ 物品重量 ] + [ 物品耐久 ] 能量 = Y [ * 品质乘数 ] * 数量 品质乘数：极差=0.5, 较差=0.8, 一般=1.0, 良好=2.0, 极佳=4.0, 大师=8.0, 传奇=16.0 默认 b=1，其他系数为0，即默认能量转化公式为 Y=X，线性关系。
[hr][/hr]
Source Code : https://github.com/Lyoko-Jeremie/RimworldMods/tree/master/FullyAutomaticOmniCrafter
---
[h2] Fully Automatic OmniCrafter [/h2]
Get Anything From Nothing! Convert energy into matter, meet your resource needs! Fully Automatic OmniCrafter is here! The technological gem of the archotech world, capable of converting energy into matter, satisfying your infinite resource demands! Whether it's food, medicine, buildings, or materials, this magical machine can easily manufacture them all! Let your colony shine anew, ushering in a new era! Archotech technology! Boys!
Adds a button to immediately complete all currently completable techs in the tech tree, until there are no more completable techs. Instantly max out your tech tree and jump straight into late game!
Comes with an infinite capacity battery that can store unlimited energy. Solves the problem of needing to manufacture a large number of batteries when crafting expensive items.
When crafting items, it first consumes the energy from the built-in battery, then consumes energy from the grid batteries. BUT ! If the grid's power supply exceeds the energy required to craft the item, then you can craft the item directly without consuming any stored energy. Surprised, aren't you~!
Under normal circumstances, it works like a regular battery, storing energy from the grid and releasing energy when the grid's supply is insufficient. If you don't need the built-in battery functionality, simply click the button to turn off the building's power (press V).
Rain won't cause short circuits, and electrical short circuits won't cause explosions (not yet tested).
Additionally, the favorites will sync across saves.
Now relies on Harmony's interception capabilities to implement power-related features.
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Matter-Energy Converter [/h2]
Decompose matter into quark particles, convert them into string fields, and then extract them as energy! A great helper for resource recycling! The Matter-Energy Converter is here!
Another technological gem of the archotech world, capable of decomposing matter into quark particles, converting them into string fields, and then extracting them as energy! Whether it's food, medicine, buildings, or materials, this magical machine can easily decompose them all! Your colony will never lack energy again! Archotech technology says, let there be light!
[h3] Three conversion methods [/h3] [list] [*] Set up a storage area, and colonists will automatically haul items onto it. Then click the "Convert Stored Items" button, and all items on the building will be decomposed and converted. [*] Use the loading button of the drop pod to load items as if loading a drop pod, then click the "Convert Loaded Items" button, and the items in the cargo hold will be decomposed and converted. [*] Directly click the "Targeted Conversion" button, then use the crosshair cursor to click on any target on the map that you want to convert, and it will be immediately decomposed and converted. [/list]
Note: The storage area of the Matter-Energy Converter does not age, and the rot will constantly reset, so it can be used as a special warehouse for temporarily storing items.
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Subspace Asset Blackhole Generator [/h2]
Fold colony assets into subspace, making them invisible to threat assessment algorithms! A secret weapon for reducing raid sizes! The Subspace Asset Blackhole Generator is here!
A mysterious device from the underground black market of the archotech world, capable of folding colony assets into subspace, hiding the colony's existence, causing enemies to underestimate the colony's wealth, and thus reducing raid sizes! Make your colony an invisible base in the eyes of the enemy!
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Ultimate Auto Repair Station [/h2]
Nip danger in the bud! Continuously repair damaged buildings and items in the colony! The Ultimate Auto Repair Station is here!
A must-have device for home and travel in the archotech world, automatically checks for damage in the home space and continuously repairs them! As long as there is one Ultimate Auto Repair Station in operation, all buildings and items in the entire colony will be continuously repaired! Keep your colony in top shape at all times, ready to face any challenge!
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Void Deleter [/h2] What was that just now? I thought it was a speed bump. Dig and demolish anything that looks unsightly! The Void Deleter is here! A garbage disposal expert in the archotech world, capable of digging and demolishing anything that looks unsightly! Make your colony look brand new!
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Reality Weaver [/h2] Build your dreams right now! Instantly realize the building blueprints and construction frames in the specified area! Build your helpers! The Reality Weaver is here!
Superior world home and travel front-line construction essential device, capable of instant realization of building blueprints and construction frames in the specified area as buildings! The energy consumption is proportional to the work required for each building (1 Wd per unit of work required). Prioritize the use of energy conversion device energy, then the unlimited battery of the fully automatic universal synthesizer, and finally the ordinary battery. Zero performance consumption when power is off or disabled.
Adds a button to immediately complete the installation and removal of roofs according to the roof area planning. After clicking, it will build or remove roofs across the entire map according to the current roof construction/removal zone settings. Supports the "No Thick Roof Planning" of ExpandedRoofing. the roof building of ExpandedRoofing will be completed by the normal automatic construction mode (since it is actually implemented as a special building blueprint frame).
Adds a button to immediately complete the floor polishing and wall polishing tasks according to the floor polishing area planning. After clicking, it will automatically complete all floor polishing and wall polishing tasks across the entire map. Adds a button to immediately complete the floor painting and remove floor painting tasks according to the floor painting area planning. After clicking, it will automatically complete all floor painting and remove floor painting tasks across the entire map (without consuming materials).
[hr][/hr]
[h2] Global Fire Extinguisher [/h2]
Use spatial folding technology to throw all flames on the map into subspace! A great helper for extinguishing fires across the map! The Global Fire Extinguisher is here!
A must-have for firefighting in the archotech world, nip the fire in the bud, and catch small fires! Remember to turn it off before setting off fireworks!
[hr][/hr]
[h3]Recommended mods to use with Fully Automatic OmniCrafter[/h3]
[list] [*] MinifyEverything Allows all buildings to be minified (only buildings that can be minified can be successfully produced) https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=872762753 [/list]
[hr][/hr]
You can adjust the energy conversion formula in the mod settings. Y = a + b·X + c·X² + d·X³ + e·X⁴ + g·log₁₀(X) + n·ln(X) X = Market Value of the item + [ Weight of the item ] + [ Durability of the item ] Energy = Y [ * Quality Multiplier ] * Quantity Quality Multiplier: Awful=0.5, Poor=0.8, Normal=1.0, Good=2.0, Excellent=4.0, Masterwork=8.0, Legendary=16.0 By default, b=1 and other coefficients are 0, so the default energy conversion formula is Y=X, a linear relationship.
[hr][/hr]
Source Code : https://github.com/Lyoko-Jeremie/RimworldMods/tree/master/FullyAutomaticOmniCrafter
